an1.61:0.2: 7. The Chapter on Arousal of Energy, Etc.
an1.61:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: the arousal of energy.
an1.61:1.2: For one with energy aroused, *bhikkhus*, unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.62:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: having many wishes.
an1.62:1.2: For one with many wishes, *bhikkhus*, unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.63:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: having few wishes.
an1.63:1.2: For one with few wishes, *bhikkhus*, unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.64:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: discontent.
an1.64:1.2: For one who is discontented, *bhikkhus*, unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.65:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: contentment.
an1.65:1.2: For one who is contented, *bhikkhus*, unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.66:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: inappropriate attention [*ayoniso manasikāra*].
an1.66:1.2: For one attending inappropriately [*ayoniso manasikāra*], *bhikkhus*, unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.67:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: appropriate attention [*yoniso manasikāra*].
an1.67:1.2: For one attending with appropriate attention [*yoniso manasikāra*], *bhikkhus*, unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.68:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: lack of full awareness [*asampajaññaṁ*].
an1.68:1.2: For one without full awareness [*sampajānā*], *bhikkhus*, unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.69:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: full awareness [*sampajaññaṁ*].
an1.69:1.2: For one with full awareness [*sampajānā*], *bhikkhus*, unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.70:1.1: “I do not see, *bhikkhus*, even a single other *dhamma* by which unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline, as does this, *bhikkhus*: bad friendship.
an1.70:1.2: For one with bad friends, *bhikkhus*, unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline.”
an1.70:1.4: The seventh: The Chapter on Arousal of Energy, Etc.
